subtitle.zh: 从一处开阔视野开始，打开宫城地图，然后选择你想深入的主要场所。
subtitle.en: Begin from a calm open-place view, open the palace map, and then step into the main spaces you want to explore.

alt.zh: 虚拟故宫平面导览地图
alt.en: Dummy palace plan map for the explore overlay

description.zh: 沿着外朝主线进入最具礼制感的宫殿序列。
description.en: Follow the ceremonial spine through the most formal halls of the outer court.

intro.zh: 这条路线以中轴礼制为核心，强调门序、台基、屋顶层级和朝会秩序的递进关系。
intro.en: This journey focuses on the ceremonial axis, reading gates, plinths, roof hierarchy, and court procession as one continuous sequence.

description.zh: 从日常政务与居住空间切入，观察更贴近宫廷生活的一面。
description.en: Read the palace through daily governance, residence, and the more intimate rhythms of court life.

intro.zh: 这条路线避开最宏大的前朝广场，转向内廷居住、祭祀与日常秩序的空间组织。
intro.en: This journey steps away from the grand outer-court forecourts and focuses on residence, devotion, and the tighter order of the inner court.

description.zh: 从柔和的门序、庭院与安静居所中阅读故宫更缓慢的一面。
description.en: Move through softer thresholds, courts, and quieter residences to read the palace at a calmer pace.

intro.zh: 这条路线强调树影、庭院光线与较安静的院落氛围，让探索节奏从仪式转向停留与观看。
intro.en: This journey leans into trees, court light, and quieter residential atmospheres, slowing the experience from ceremony toward observation.

subtitle.zh: 收集已造访场所与完成路线的印记，保留你的故宫探索轨迹。
subtitle.en: Collect visited-place stamps and completed-route seals to keep a record of your palace journey.

description.zh: 完成中轴礼制路线后解锁，象征外朝礼制与中轴秩序的完整阅读。
description.en: Unlocked after finishing the Ceremonial Axis route, marking a full reading of the outer-court ceremonial spine.

description.zh: 完成内廷起居路线后解锁，象征你已走入更贴近宫廷生活的空间层次。
description.en: Unlocked after finishing the Inner Court Life route, recognizing the more intimate residential layers of the palace.

description.zh: 完成园林静观路线后解锁，记录一条更缓慢、更安静的故宫观察路径。
description.en: Unlocked after finishing the Garden & Quiet Spaces route, preserving a slower and quieter way through the palace.

shortDescription.zh: 一处被树冠包围的安静入口，适合用作探索故宫深处的第一步。
shortDescription.en: A quiet threshold wrapped by tall cypress canopies, suited to opening a calmer path into the deeper palace grounds.

longDescription.zh: 天一门被设计成一个由景观转向建筑的过渡点。树影、地面轴线和中间小品雕塑让空间读起来更像一个被引导进入的花园门序。在此版中，它是欢迎用户进入故宫探索路径的柔和起点。
longDescription.en: Tianyi Men acts as a transition from landscape into architecture. Tree shadows, axial paving, and a centered sculptural focal point make the scene feel like a guided garden threshold. In this version it serves as a soft welcoming entry into the palace exploration path.

shortDescription.zh: 开阔前场与重檐立面，象征外朝的最高礼制。
shortDescription.en: A broad forecourt and layered roofs signal the highest ceremonial order of the outer court.

longDescription.zh: 太和殿是外朝礼仪核心，本示例强调广场尺度、台基与金色屋檐的仪式感。
longDescription.en: Taihe Dian anchors the ceremonial axis; this placeholder emphasizes the scale of the plaza, the raised plinth, and the gilded roofline.

shortDescription.zh: 红墙、金彩和简洁院落组成一个更近距离的内廷空间。
shortDescription.en: Red walls, gilded detail, and a compact court produce a more intimate inner-palace atmosphere.

longDescription.zh: 养心殿的印象不是开阄巨大，而是亲近且被什细组装的秩序。较小的庭院、压缩的前场和正门形成一种更接近宫廷生活的观觉经验。这个虚拟版用它作为内廷系列场所的代表。
longDescription.en: Yangxin Dian reads less as monumental spectacle and more as intimate, tightly assembled order. The smaller forecourt and compressed frontal composition shift the experience toward palace life rather than grand ceremony. Here it stands in for the inner-court domestic sequence.

shortDescription.zh: 偏向一侧的居住庭院，氛围更安静内向。
shortDescription.en: A calmer residential courtyard on the side of the axis, quieter and more inward.

longDescription.zh: 景仁宫以较小尺度和柔和采光呈现内庭居住感，适合在探索中穿插停留。
longDescription.en: Jingren Gong reads as an intimate inner-court residence. It provides a softer pause between grander ceremonial moments.

shortDescription.zh: 位于轴线中段，尺度收敛，作为礼仪的停顿与过渡。
shortDescription.en: Centered on the axis, its smaller scale creates a pause between larger ceremonial halls.

longDescription.zh: 中和殿在宏大序列中提供节奏变化，视线与步伐在此短暂停留。
longDescription.en: Zhonghe Dian introduces a quieter rhythm in the processional sequence, letting the eye and the pace briefly settle before moving onward.

shortDescription.zh: 很强的对称和台基比例让它读起来更正式，也更安静。
shortDescription.en: Strong symmetry and a raised plinth give it a more formal and composed reading.

longDescription.zh: 奉先殿的形象更注重观者对正面的凝视。台基和栏杆将人的路线引向中心，同时保留冷静稳定的宗庙气质。这里的虚拟内容用来体现故宫中更胃正和宗庙感的建筑一面。
longDescription.en: Fengxian Dian emphasizes sustained frontal viewing. The terrace and railings guide the visitor toward the center while preserving a calm ancestral-hall atmosphere. In this dummy set it represents the more solemn, temple-like side of the Forbidden City.

shortDescription.zh: 台基与屋面更显伸展，形成仪典终点的开放感。
shortDescription.en: An elongated platform and roof line give this hall a sense of ceremonial completion.

longDescription.zh: 保和殿作为外朝礼制的后段节点，本示例强调空间的延展与收束。
longDescription.en: Baohe Dian closes the outer-court sequence; this placeholder emphasizes the stretch and resolution of the processional space.

shortDescription.zh: 靠近门叶的红色组图让空间更具压迫感，也更渲染通过之意。
shortDescription.en: A near-door red composition makes the view tighter and more charged, emphasizing passage and threshold.

longDescription.zh: 乾清门的体验重点不在开阔视野，而在门扇、红墙和装饰细节带来的强度。在场景中，它被处理成一个更紧密的通行点，让人对故宫门序的层级感有更直接的感受。
longDescription.en: Qianqing Men is less about broad view and more about the intensity of painted doors, red walls, and decorative detail. In the dummy experience it becomes a tighter passage point that makes palace thresholds feel immediate and layered.

alt.en: Close view of Qianqing Men doors

caption.en: Close view of Qianqing Men doors

shortDescription.zh: 开阔的前场和几乎满幅的建筑立面让它显得温暖、明亮且稳重。
shortDescription.en: A broad forecourt and almost full-width facade make the hall feel bright, warm, and steady.

longDescription.zh: 皇极殿在此版的作用是呈现另一种开敞的室外正庭体验。观者立在开阔前场，会更直接地观察屋檐、柱列和地面轴线共同建立的空间秩序。
longDescription.en: Huangji Dian represents a brighter, more open forecourt experience. From the wide apron, the viewer can read the eaves, colonnade, and central paving as a single ordered composition.

shortDescription.zh: 阳光下的庭院比较安静，更像是结束探索时的收束场所。
shortDescription.en: This quieter sunlit court feels more residential and works well as a softer closing place in the route.

longDescription.zh: 寿康宫以比较平缓的场景尺度和充足的日照显得格外温和。它适合在路径末端提供一个更静的观视结尾，也让组图中的树影和地面反光有更大的表现空间。
longDescription.en: Shoukang Gong is intentionally softer in scale and brighter in light. It works as a quiet closing moment in the route, giving tree shadow and reflected ground light a larger role in the spatial impression.
